news.headline: BTC drops 1.5% on Fed rate cut concerns; $88K target still in sight. Ends 14-candle green streak amid market speculations for 2025 cuts.
news.summary: After a streak of 14 consecutive increases, the price of Bitcoin has finally declined. This change comes amidst market expectations shifting away from the likelihood of additional interest rate reductions in 2025.

news.headline: New sanctions target Russia's energy sector, including the "shadow fleet," to reduce oil and gas output.
news.summary: The Biden administration is intensifying efforts to control the Russian "shadow fleet" and implementing measures to limit oil and gas output.

news.headline: Global refurbished medical equipment market to reach USD 24.41 billion by 2029 at a 7.6% CAGR, up from USD 16.93 billion in 2024.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of January 10, 2025, it has been projected that the worldwide market for Refurbished Medical Equipment will see a substantial increase, reaching an estimated value of USD 24.41 billion by the year 2029. This is a notable rise from its worth of USD 16.93 billion in 2024, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.6% during the forecast period. Factors contributing to this growth include...

news.headline: Microbot Medical closed an $8.6 million offering of 3,788,550 common stock shares at $2.27/share, alongside issuing 7,577,100 preferred investment options with an exercise price of $2.10/share for a duration of two years.
news.summary: Microbot Medical Inc. based in Braintree, Mass., revealed on January 10, 2025, the completion of its registered direct offering totaling 3,788,550 shares of common stock at $2.27 per share, in accordance with Nasdaq rules. Simultaneously, the company conducted a private placement issuance of unregistered short-term series H preferred investment options, allowing the acquisition of up to 7,577,100 shares of common stock at $2.10 per share. The options are exercisable immediately upon issuance and for the following two years.

news.headline: Y-mAbs sets 2025 priorities with two business units to expedite radiopharmaceuticals dev and boost DANYELZA sales.
news.summary: A company has recently created two separate business divisions with the aim of speeding up the clinical development of its Radiopharmaceuticals Platform and maximizing the commercial opportunities related to DANYELZA. This strategic move signifies a focused effort on driving growth in these areas. The company's decision to establish these units underscores its commitment to innovation and expansion within the medical sector.

news.headline: PetVivo partners with Vedco Inc. and Clipper Distributing, expanding market reach to US vet industry giants like MWI, Covetrus.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, PetVivo Holdings, Inc. revealed that they have formed distribution agreements with Vedco Inc. and Clipper Distributing, LLC. PetVivo, known for its advancements in biomedical technology, is dedicated to transforming human biotech and medical device innovations for use in osteoarthritis and lameness products in the US animal market. The partnerships with Vedco and Clipper, renowned for their logistical expertise, aim to enhance the availability of PetVivo products to veterinarians nationwide. Vedco and Clipper's extensive reach includes distribution to major veterinary product suppliers like MWI, Covetrus, Patterson, Midwest Supply, and Penn Supply, bolstering PetVivo's presence in the industry. The collaboration signifies a significant step for PetVivo in expanding its market penetration and accessibility to a broader network of veterinary professionals.

news.headline: Alm Brand issued Tier-2 bonds totaling 500 million in capital for expansion.
Riksbank sets conditions for government bond auctions, impacting bidding process.
Bioxytran's preprint shows potential to improve immunotherapy drugs in cancer, may enhance response rate.
news.summary: In Boston, Massachusetts on January 10, 2025, Bioxytran, Inc. (OTCQB: BIXT), a biotechnology company, shared news about their latest research. The company, focused on developing oral and intravenous drugs for various health conditions like viral diseases, fibrosis, stroke, dementia, and Alzheimer's disease, unveiled a preprint article called “Immune Checkpoint Inhibitors (ICI): Prospects for Galectin-3 Modulation to Increase Objective Response Rate (ORR) and Remission-free Survival in Oncology Patients.” The article, penned by Dr. Adesuyi Ajayi, Dr. David Platt, and Andrew Blumenthal, delves into theories on resistance to ICI therapy, spotlighting galectin-3’s role in resistance mechanisms.

news.headline: Global Color Cosmetics Market valued at USD 76.50 billion in 2023, projected to reach USD 104.45 billion by 2029, growing at CAGR of 5.33%.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the Color Cosmetics Market has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market was worth USD 76.50 billion in 2023 and is expected to hit USD 104.45 billion by 2029, with a growth rate of 5.33% CAGR. The industry is highly competitive with established global brands, emerging players, and niche innovators all competing for market share.

news.headline: Wall Street's talent war leads to higher bonuses, according to reports.
Win VIP tickets to the MAHA Inaugural Ball in Washington D.C. on January 20, 2025, commemorating President Trump's victory.
news.summary: Gala Games is offering the opportunity to win VIP tickets to the MAHA Inaugural Ball taking place in Washington D.C. on January 20, 2025. The event is a celebration of President Trump's significant triumph.

news.headline: Ethereum devs address Pectra & validator needs in ACDC Call #148, discussing Gloas upgrade & hardware requirements.
news.summary: The recent Ethereum All Core Developers Consensus Call #148 primarily discussed important updates regarding Pectra testing, validator hardware criteria, and the proposed Gloas upgrade name. The meeting highlighted key details and considerations for participants.

TELUS Digital (TIXT) addresses recent share trading, related to changes in social media fact-checking practices.
news.summary: TELUS Digital Experience, a leading company listed on NYSE and TSX under the ticker symbol TIXT, has released a statement addressing recent trading activity involving its subordinate voting shares. Media reports have been circulating following an announcement made on January 7, 2025, by a prominent social media platform regarding changes to its third-party fact-checking approach in the U.S. This has sparked discussions on content moderation. The company aims to provide clarity amidst the ongoing market developments.

news.headline: MT Sobek now outfitter for REI Adventures trips, as REI exits travel space - effective Jan 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Emeryville, California on January 10th, 2025, MT Sobek, a leading adventure travel company, has revealed its new partnership as the outfitter for the well-known tours previously operated by REI Adventures. Following REI Adventures' departure from the adventure travel industry, individuals now have the opportunity to reschedule their trips with MT Sobek.

news.headline: MarketsandMarkets™ report projects future of robotics market to 2030, covering various technologies and industries.
news.summary: A recent report released on January 10, 2025 in Delray Beach, Florida discusses the future of robotics focusing on various types of robots including cobots, humanoid robots, soft robots, and swarm robotics. The report analyzes the impact of technologies such as artificial intelligence, digital twin, AR/VR, and cloud computing on the robotics sector. It delves into different industries where robotics are being utilized such as automotive, smart cities, space exploration, logistics, and agriculture. This comprehensive study provides insights into the advancements and trends in robotics across diverse sectors.

Snail Games' ARK: Ultimate Mobile Edition surpasses 3M downloads in 3 weeks, seen as strong early adoption.
news.summary: In Culver City, California, on January 10, 2024, Snail, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNAL), known as Snail Games, a prominent independent developer and publisher of interactive digital entertainment, partnered with Studio Wildcard and developer Grove Street Games. This collaboration was announced to the public.

Judge in Trump hush money case imposes no jail or fine but sentence places judgment of guilt on president-elect's record.
Peoples Financial Services Corp. appoints Gerard A. Champi as CEO and Thomas P. Tulaney as President.
news.summary: In Dunmore, Pennsylvania, on January 10, 2025, Peoples Financial Services Corp. revealed that Gerard A. Champi has been appointed as the Chief Executive Officer (CEO), while Thomas P. Tulaney has been named President for both the Company.

news.headline: Blake Lively files lawsuit against Wayfarer Studios, alleging harassment by co-star and director. Case analyzed by legal experts.
news.summary: In Bridgewater, N.J., on Jan. 10, 2025, Blake Lively filed a lawsuit against Wayfarer Studios, LLC, accusing her It Ends with Us (2024) co-star and director, Justin Baldoni, as well as producer James Heath of unscripted harassment. The lawsuit was filed by Norris McLaughlin, P.A.'s The Employment Strategists Podcast.

news.headline: Midea unveils energy-efficient heat pump water heater in Louisville, Ky., on Jan. 10, 2025, pioneering sustainable heating.
news.summary: Cutting-edge Home Appliance Promises Superior Efficiency, Performance, and Simple Setup LOUISVILLE, Ky., Jan. 10, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- The growing preference for energy-efficient and environmentally friendly heating solutions has made heat pump technology increasingly popular. Recently, a revolutionary appliance has been introduced, offering exceptional efficiency and performance, as well as easy installation. This marks a significant advancement in the push towards sustainability.

news.headline: TD SYNNEX Q4: Revenue $15.85B, up 10% Y/Y; Adjusted EPS $3.09 beats street view; Gross billings $21.2B; Stock gains.
news.summary: TD SYNNEX Corp (SNX) saw its stock rise after releasing its Q4 results. The company reported quarterly revenue of $15.85 billion, a 10% increase year-over-year, surpassing the analyst estimate of $15.22 billion. Their adjusted EPS was $3.09, beating expectations of $3.05. Revenue grew by 9.2% on a constant currency basis, driven by growth in Advanced Solutions and Endpoint Solutions. Adjusted gross billings for the quarter were $21.2 billion, up from $19.7 billion in the same quarter last year. Gross profit increased to $1.04 billion from $1.02 billion in the previous year.

news.headline: US Treasury sanctions entities tied to Gazprom Neft.
